diagnostics.message: unresolved toplevel call to `some_object`. If a project file defines `some_object` via a toplevel `def` or a monkey-patch on Object/Kernel, list that file in `.rigor.yml`'s `pre_eval:` (ADR-17) so the analyzer sees it.
